insights.trajectory: Successfully migrated from Arduino to pure ESP-IDF with 52 KB size reduction. Obsolete demos and LVGL files cleaned up. Clean working tree indicates migration is complete and stable.

insights.reasoning: 8+ commits of design reviews and component swaps - classic signs of hardware design convergence. Clean tree means current revision is stable.
